query:
UPDATE places SET description = CASE name
  WHEN 'Hanimadhoo' THEN 'Hanimadhoo is the northernmost inhabited island in the Maldives, offering a unique blend of local culture and pristine natural beauty. This remote island is perfect for travelers seeking an authentic Maldivian experience away from crowded tourist destinations. The island features traditional fishing villages, beautiful beaches, and excellent opportunities for snorkeling and diving in nearby reefs.'
  WHEN 'Utheemu' THEN 'Utheemu is a historically significant island known as the birthplace of Mohamed Thakurufaanu, a legendary Maldivian hero. The island features traditional architecture, cultural heritage sites, and a peaceful atmosphere perfect for cultural exploration. Visitors can experience authentic island life and learn about Maldivian history and traditions.'
  WHEN 'Kandooma' THEN 'Kandooma is a pristine island known for its world-class diving and snorkeling opportunities. The island features vibrant coral reefs, abundant marine life, and excellent visibility for underwater exploration. Perfect for divers of all skill levels seeking an authentic diving experience in the Maldives.'
  WHEN 'Kaashidhoo' THEN 'Kaashidhoo is a charming local island offering authentic Maldivian hospitality and natural beauty. The island features beautiful beaches, friendly local communities, and excellent opportunities for water sports and cultural experiences. A perfect destination for travelers seeking genuine island experiences.'
  WHEN 'Funadhoo' THEN 'Funadhoo is a quiet, underdeveloped island perfect for travelers seeking solitude and natural beauty. The island features pristine beaches, clear waters, and minimal tourist infrastructure, making it ideal for those seeking an off-the-beaten-path experience in the Maldives.'
  WHEN 'Thoddoo' THEN 'Thoddoo is an agricultural island known for its farming and local produce. The island offers a unique perspective on Maldivian rural life, with opportunities to visit local farms and learn about traditional agriculture. Perfect for eco-conscious travelers interested in sustainable tourism.'
  WHEN 'Eydhafushi' THEN 'Eydhafushi is the administrative center of Baa Atoll, serving as a hub for local commerce and culture. The island features local markets, government offices, and authentic island atmosphere. A great destination for experiencing everyday Maldivian life.'
  WHEN 'Naifaru' THEN 'Naifaru is a local island with traditional Maldivian charm and authentic culture. The island features local guesthouses, restaurants, and shops, offering a genuine island experience. Perfect for budget-conscious travelers seeking authentic experiences.'
  WHEN 'Meedhoo' THEN 'Meedhoo is a quiet local island offering peaceful surroundings and authentic Maldivian hospitality. The island features beautiful beaches, clear waters, and a relaxed atmosphere perfect for travelers seeking tranquility.'
  WHEN 'Velidhoo' THEN 'Velidhoo is a charming local island with traditional architecture and friendly communities. The island offers opportunities for cultural exchange, local cuisine experiences, and water sports. Perfect for travelers seeking authentic island experiences.'
  WHEN 'Addu City' THEN 'Addu City is the southernmost urban center in the Maldives, serving as the main hub for the southern atolls. The city features modern infrastructure, shopping facilities, and cultural attractions. A gateway to exploring the remote southern regions of the Maldives.'
  WHEN 'Gan' THEN 'Gan is the main island of Addu City, featuring the southernmost airport in the Maldives. The island serves as a transportation hub and offers access to pristine southern dive sites and islands. Perfect for exploring the remote southern Maldives.'
  WHEN 'Felidhoo' THEN 'Felidhoo is a local island in Vaavu Atoll known for its diving opportunities and local culture. The island features guesthouses, local restaurants, and access to nearby dive sites. Perfect for budget-friendly diving experiences.'
  WHEN 'Mulah' THEN 'Mulah is the capital of Meemu Atoll, serving as the administrative and commercial center. The island features local markets, government offices, and authentic island atmosphere. A hub for exploring the central atolls.'
  WHEN 'Keyodhoo' THEN 'Keyodhoo is a featured island in Vaavu Atoll known for its diving and snorkeling opportunities. The island offers access to pristine reefs and marine life. Perfect for water sports enthusiasts.'
  WHEN 'Fulidhoo' THEN 'Fulidhoo is a charming island in Vaavu Atoll offering authentic experiences and water sports opportunities. The island features local guesthouses and access to nearby dive sites. Perfect for budget-friendly island experiences.'
  WHEN 'Fuvamulah' THEN 'Fuvamulah is a unique atoll island known for its distinctive geography and tiger shark encounters. The island offers unique diving experiences, pristine beaches, and authentic local culture. Perfect for adventurous travelers seeking unique Maldivian experiences.'
  ELSE description
END,
icon = CASE type WHEN 'island' THEN '🏝️' ELSE icon END,
color = CASE type WHEN 'island' THEN '#0891b2' ELSE color END,
rating = CASE WHEN rating IS NULL OR rating = 0 THEN 4.5 ELSE rating END,
bestSeason = CASE WHEN bestSeason IS NULL OR bestSeason = '' THEN 'November to April' ELSE bestSeason END
WHERE type = 'island' AND (description IS NULL OR description = '')
